name: public-welfare-npc-asset-normalization
title: Public welfare NPC asset normalization
description: Normalize default public-welfare NPC expression assets to valid PNG bytes and accepted runtime dimensions, then refresh prompt sidecar metadata.
creator: lijin
notes: Fixed pytest regression caused by public-welfare NPC sprites with .png filenames but JPEG bytes and oversized PNG assets. Verification passed: focused public-welfare tests, sidecar validation, full pytest, and frontend build.
